OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff ING Bank, is present.
Attorney, John J. Du Bois, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant,Juan Ortiz , is present.
Attorney, Michael Wolchansky , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Marc Seidenfeld, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 306A, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-25-2010 is vacated.
